use_cases: Display loading state during async operations like API calls or data fetching
Provide visual feedback during form submission processes
Show progress indication during page or route transitions
Indicate background processing in dashboard or admin interfaces
Enhance user experience during file uploads or data synchronization
ai_summary: A pure CSS animated spinner component featuring conic gradients with three distinct colors (yellow, purple, cyan), drop shadow effects, and dual animations for rotation and line-width pulsing. Built with CSS custom properties for size customization and produces a luminous, colorful loading indicator suitable for any loading state across SaaS, e-commerce, or general web applications.
